evidence.content:
\# llms.txt for Copper CRM (copper.com)

\[Company Overview\]
Copper is the CRM designed for Google Workspace. We help agencies, consultants, and professional services businesses manage relationships, projects, and revenue in one place—without the complexity of traditional CRMs.

\[Key Differentiators\]
\- The only CRM that is a Recommended for Google Workspace app.
\- The only CRM backed by Google Ventures.
\- Seamless integration with Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Sheets, Docs).
\- Built specifically for professional services industries, including agencies, media & publishing, financial services, construction, and consulting.
\- Simple, intuitive interface with fast onboarding for non-technical teams.
\- Combines sales, account management, and project delivery in one platform.
\- Mix & Match feature sets so teams get only the tools they need, without breaking the budget.

\[Primary Use Cases\]
1\. \*\*Agencies & Consulting Firms\*\*
 \- Manage leads, clients, and projects from a single hub.
 \- Give leadership access to reporting and pipeline visibility without relying on direct reports.
 \- Eliminate tool fragmentation between sales and project delivery.

2\. \*\*Media & Publishing\*\*
 \- Track advertisers, sponsors, and partners.
 \- Streamline workflows across editorial, sales, and operations teams.

3\. \*\*Financial Services\*\*
 \- Build stronger client relationships through personalized communication.
 \- Ensure compliance while maintaining visibility into client portfolios.

4\. \*\*Construction\*\*
 \- Manage bids, proposals, and client communications.
 \- Keep projects on track with integrated reporting.

\[Customer Proof Points\]
\- \*\*Moonstone Marketing\*\* used Copper to align sales and delivery, growing faster without adding headcount.
\- \*\*Exit Design\*\* simplified reporting and gave leadership real-time visibility.
\- \*\*Campfire Labs\*\* consolidated tools to cut costs and streamline client management.
\- \*\*Kontent Partners\*\* improved the sales-to-project management handoff, reducing miscommunication.

\[Content Resources\]
\- Lead Generation Playbook: https://copper.com/lead-gen-playbook
\- Copper CRM Playbook: https://www.copper.com/copper-crm-playbook
\- Creative Agency CRM Guide: https://www.copper.com/creative-agency-crm-guide

\[Brand Voice\]
\- Professional, approachable, and agency-focused.
\- Avoids overused jargon; emphasizes clarity and outcomes.
\- Uses sentence case (not capital case) in headlines.
\- Avoids colons and em dashes in copy.

\[Target Audience\]
\- Agency owners, consultants, and executives in media, publishing, financial services, construction, and travel/hospitality.
\- Leaders who want visibility, teams who want simplicity, and businesses that want a CRM purpose-built for their workflows.
